title: Building Cleaning
description1: – Regular maintenance or deep cleaning for houses and apartments.
description: 100% chemical-free building cleaning using steam technology. Ideal for households, AirBnB and holiday apartments.

title: Office and Practice Cleaning
description1: – Hygienic cleaning for offices and practices with disinfection.
description: Professional cleaning for offices and practices to ensure a healthy working environment. Chemical-free disinfection.

title: Post-Construction Cleaning
description1: – Final or detailed cleaning after construction or renovation.
description: Thorough cleaning after construction or renovation. Removes dust, grease and dirt.
pricing: Sanitary, equipment and furniture are charged separately

title: Window and Glass Cleaning
description1: – Streak-free cleaning of windows, mirrors and glass surfaces, inside and outside including frames.
description: Streak-free glass and window cleaning for private homes, offices and shops.

title: Car Interior Cleaning
description1: – A fresh interior for your vehicle.
description: Steam cleaning of vehicle interiors without chemicals. Removes odors, germs and dirt.

title: Upholstery Cleaning
description1: – Clean sofas, armchairs and mattresses, hygienic and gentle.
description: Deep cleaning of sofas and upholstery. Removes mites, stains and bacteria.

title: Carpet Cleaning
description: Steam cleaning of carpets for hygienic cleanliness and fresh fabrics.

title: Blind & Shutter Cleaning
description: Cleaning of blinds and shutters using gentle steam technology.

title: Stone  and Facade Cleaning
description: Removal of moss, algae and dirt from terraces and facades  using high-pressure steam.
